chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIG COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2388 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 to 5. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.08.2025 Mr. Jahangir Shams, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- The petitioner seeks appointment to any position on a disabled quota. At this point in time, no advertisement has been made by the Government of Sindh regarding any job vacancy. However, in the event that any advertisement is made for a job by the Government of Sindh, it shall also ensure that there is a quota for disabled persons in accordance with law. Once such advertisement is published by the Government of Sindh, the petitioner, if he so desires, may apply for such job, which application shall be decided in accordance with law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Secretary Services General Administration, Government of Sindh for information and compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
